title: Affirm (AFRM) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript
text:
Affirm (AFRM) Q2 2024 Earnings Call Transcript

Affirm reported Q2 2024 fiscal year earnings with robust performance metrics and positive forward guidance.

Key Metrics:
- Continued GMV growth acceleration
- Revenue growth outpacing guidance
- Operating margin expansion continuing
- Affirm Card adoption increasing with improving unit economics
- Market share gains in key merchant categories
- Credit performance remaining stable

Forward Guidance:
- Management provided updated full-year guidance reflecting confidence
- Continued focus on operating leverage while maintaining growth investments
- Affirm Card positioned as key growth driver for future periods
- Credit quality expected to remain stable within target parameters

Management Commentary:
CEO emphasized the company's strong competitive position and ability to scale profitably. Discussion centered on the maturation of enterprise partnerships and the opportunity for newer, smaller merchants to drive incremental volume.
